(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b3 on table, b4 on b3
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 2): b5 on table, b6 on b5
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 3): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 4): b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on table, b3 on b4
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on b8
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b13 on table, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11
      (on-table b13)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 5): b3 b4 b5 b6 b7
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 12): b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (clear b19)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on b1 b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (was on bottom), b7 on table (was on top)
      (on-table b7)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b8 on top (was on bottom), b19 on table (was on top)
      (on-table b19)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
